(Redirected from [2017 ANZAC Test](/w/index.php?title=2017_ANZAC_Test&redirect=no "2017 ANZAC Test"))

The **2017 Anzac Test** was a [rugby league test match](/wiki/Test_match_(rugby_league) "Test match (rugby league)") played between [Australia](/wiki/Australia_national_rugby_league_team "Australia national rugby league team") and [New Zealand](/wiki/New_Zealand_national_rugby_league_team "New Zealand national rugby league team") at [Canberra Stadium](/wiki/Canberra_Stadium "Canberra Stadium"). It was the 18th and last [Anzac Test](/wiki/Anzac_Test "Anzac Test") played between the two nations since the first was played under the [Super League](/wiki/Super_League_(Australia) "Super League (Australia)") banner in [1997](/wiki/1997_Anzac_Test "1997 Anzac Test"). The match was played on 5 May 2017.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

The Australian team was announced on 26 April,[[2]](#cite_note-2) while the New Zealand team was announced on 30 April with the starters and 18th man named on 4 May.[[3]](#cite_note-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4)

The [Junior Kangaroos](/wiki/Junior_Kangaroos "Junior Kangaroos") beat the [Junior Kiwis](/wiki/Junior_Kiwis "Junior Kiwis").[[5]](#cite_note-5)[[6]](#cite_note-6)

1 - [Josh Papalii](/wiki/Josh_Papalii "Josh Papalii") was originally selected to play but was withdrawn due to suspension. His original replacement, [Shannon Boyd](/wiki/Shannon_Boyd "Shannon Boyd"), also withdrew due to injury. He was replaced by [Jake Trbojevic](/wiki/Jake_Trbojevic "Jake Trbojevic") who was 18th Man.[[7]](#cite_note-7)  
2 - [Aaron Woods](/wiki/Aaron_Woods "Aaron Woods") was originally selected to play but withdrew due to injury. He was replaced by [Andrew Fifita](/wiki/Andrew_Fifita "Andrew Fifita").[[8]](#cite_note-8)

* [Jordan McLean](/wiki/Jordan_McLean "Jordan McLean"), [James Maloney](/wiki/James_Maloney_(rugby_league) "James Maloney (rugby league)") and [Justin O'Neill](/wiki/Justin_O%27Neill "Justin O'Neill") were a part of the Kangaroos squad but did not play in the match.
* [Elijah Taylor](/wiki/Elijah_Taylor_(rugby_league) "Elijah Taylor (rugby league)"), [David Fusitu'a](/wiki/David_Fusitu%27a "David Fusitu'a") and [Brandon Smith](/wiki/Brandon_Smith_(rugby_league) "Brandon Smith (rugby league)") were a part of the Kiwis squad but did not play in the match.

## Women's Test

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2017_Anzac_Test&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Women's Test")]

A [Women's rugby league](/wiki/Women%27s_rugby_league "Women's rugby league") match between the [Australian Jillaroos](/wiki/Australian_Jillaroos "Australian Jillaroos") and New Zealand [Kiwi Ferns](/wiki/Kiwi_Ferns "Kiwi Ferns") served as the curtain-raiser for the main game.

Australia initially named a squad with 25 players on April 26.[[10]](#cite_note-10) This was then finalised to 20 in preparation for the Trans-Tasman Test.[[11]](#cite_note-11)

New Zealand named their 18 player squad in preparation for the Trans-Tasman Test on April 26.[[12]](#cite_note-12)[[13]](#cite_note-13)
